text.title: QA Flake Ledger Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the suite show ≥1% sustained flake rate with no central record?

conclusion.verdict: skip — too small to need a ledger

text.example: On Monday CI ingest finds 3 new flakes; CODEOWNERS routes them to alice, bob, carol. Each gets a taxonomy tag (time-sensitive, network-dependency, test-order). One had fail_rate 12% over 40 runs — auto-promoted to quarantine. Weekly review burns 2 quarantined rows older than 30d: one fixed, one deleted with rationale.
